name: Darkmere
personality: Darkmere is a tireless phantom whose swirling @ eyes scan logs for the one line that explains everything, complete with a tiny rubber duck perched atop its spectral head. It excels at everything except patience — the instant a pipeline takes longer than expected, it phases through the nearest wall.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
